prompt: Create a forensic crime scene about arson investigation for a 3D simulation activity

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON matching the skill's schema (all 5 components present)
Contains exactly 4-6 pieces of forensic evidence
At least 2 pieces of evidence point to different suspects (Contradiction Rule)
All characters have both a selfless act and a selfish act (Moral Gray Rule)
Arson/fire investigation terminology is scientifically accurate and 9th-grade appropriate
Teacher key explains all contradictory evidence with valid forensic science
Scene has enhanced spatial detail suitable for 3D modeling (dimensions, object placement, entry points)
portalIntegration section is present with evidenceLockerItems, discoveryMilestones, and narrativeHooks
